summary: PDF Export and Dashboard Trends Enhancement Testing Complete. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified showing trend indicators, mini sparkline, debounced search with filter chips, and PDF/CSV export buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF endpoints correctly return application/pdf content-type with valid %PDF- header
Dashboard-trends endpoint returns current_week, previous_week, deltas, and 7-day mini_trend array
Overview tab shows trend indicators (up/down arrows) for Open CVEs and Fixed stats
Mini sparkline chart renders 7-day trend data using Recharts
CVE Database tab has debounced search (350ms delay) with active filter chips
Clear all filters button properly resets all filters
Export section has both CSV and PDF buttons for all 3 export types
Loading skeletons display during data fetch in Governance tab
Tab navigation is responsive with horizontal scroll on smaller viewports
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing CVE data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF export endpoints and dashboard-trends verified. New features include: TrendIndicator component showing deltas vs last week, MiniSparkline chart for 7-day CVE trend, debounced search in CVE Database with ActiveFilters chips, and PDF download buttons alongside CSV in Export section.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB collections

Backend_PDF_Export.GET_executive_pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF (application/pdf, starts with %PDF-)
Backend_PDF_Export.GET_cves_pdf: PASS - Returns valid PDF with optional severity/status filters
Backend_PDF_Export.pdf_file_size: All PDFs > 500 bytes confirming content generation

Backend_Dashboard_Trends.GET_dashboard_trends: PASS - Returns 200 with correct JSON structure
Backend_Dashboard_Trends.mini_trend_array: PASS - 7 entries with day and count

Frontend_Overview_Tab.stat_cards: PASS - Open CVEs, Overdue, Fixed, Verified, Services, SBOMs
Frontend_Overview_Tab.trend_indicator_open_cves: PASS - Shows '+16 vs last week' with up arrow
Frontend_Overview_Tab.mini_sparkline: PASS - Displays 7-day trend chart with Recharts

Frontend_CVE_Database_Tab.active_filters_chips: PASS - Shows Status and Search chips with X buttons
Frontend_CVE_Database_Tab.cve_count_label: PASS - Shows '14 CVEs found' (filtered) or '21 CVEs found' (all)

Frontend_Reporting_Tab.sub_tabs: PASS - Executive Summary, Trends, Team Performance, Scanner Stats, Export
Frontend_Reporting_Tab.save_report_section: PASS - Input and Save button present

Frontend_Governance_Tab.loading_skeleton: PASS - Skeleton displays during data fetch
Frontend_Governance_Tab.view_buttons: PASS - Overview, Trends, SLA Compliance, Ownership
Frontend_Governance_Tab.risk_gauge: PASS - Displays score with color coding

Frontend_Responsive.tablet_768px: PASS - Tab navigation scrollable, layout adapts
Frontend_Responsive.mobile_390px: PASS - 2-column grid for cards, tabs scrollable
